title: luzula campestris var. praecox
intro: Luzula campestris var. praecox is a variety of the Luzula campestris plant, commonly known as field woodrush, a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Juncaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Luzula campestris var. praecox include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
